title: sabulina afghanica
intro: Sabulina afghanica, also known as Afghan orosho, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, the leaves and roots of this plant have been used to treat various health conditions, due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sabulina afghanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to provide relief from various ailments.
